consistency.class_mapping: Consistent with standard D&D 5e class progression for Warlock.
consistency.level_progression: Standard ASI/Feat progression level (4, 8, 12, 16, 19) for all classes.
consistency.mechanics_description: Accurate description of the Ability Score Improvement mechanic.

quality.completeness: Complete; includes name, class, level, and full description.
quality.clarity: Very clear and direct description of the choice granted.

mechanics.class_specific: No; this is a universal class progression feature, not specific to Warlock themes, but correctly attributed to the Warlock class progression table.
